message: Jake
Yuriko
Patricia
Gloria
Cindy
Kristy
I feel like I’ve wandered into a totally mismatched place.
With the entrance of the two great actresses, the interior has become something that feels almost unreal.
Maybe it's been a while since the party, but I’m somehow overwhelmed by the atmosphere.
It feels that way.
When I think about it, usually,
I’m blocked from view almost every day, so if this becomes a habit,
I really don’t want to think about it.
Everyone is chatting and joking with each other.
Even though there’s a celebrity nearby, why do I have to have this right in front of me?
Why do I have to deal with this?
At the moment, she's becoming a headache for me, that young lady.
She's always dressed in a way I'm used to seeing.
However, seeing her in such an unreal place makes me rapidly recall reality.
This girl often misunderstands, so seeing her too many times can lead to misconceptions.
Originally, she has a charming type of face, so outfits emphasizing cuteness like this suit her better than sexy ones.
Usually, she wears rigid and unappealing clothes.
It's a face I see almost every day. Maybe because she's dressed up more than usual, she looks a bit cute.
I wonder if this dress was bought at a fancier store than usual?
What's wrong, Boss?
No, there isn't any problem, right?
And I start to feel anxious.
How rude! When have I ever done something like that?
Saying that,
she puffs her cheeks like a monkey.
Making that face, you're ruining your stylish look.
It's fine, you can't be seen by others.
Is the party fun?
Ah, yes, I mean, it's not often you get to meet celebrities up close like this, so I'm a bit nervous.
That's a strange way to say it.
Apparently, Ted, the lead actor of this movie, can't make it due to work.
I'm just super
shocked!!
So, are you here just to see that Ted guy?
Hehe, actually I am. I just love Ted so much. So, I'm really disappointed.
Ugh.
Boss
Are you possibly in love with me?
What makes you think that?
Well, we see each other almost every day, and even at times like this,
you want to talk to me. It just clicked in my head.
It just clicked in my head.
Did it?
Of course, I'm just kidding. Please don't take it seriously.
Boss, I'd be fine. I'm doing my job properly.
Job.
Yeah. Starting tomorrow, the requests will be pouring in. Hehe.
What on earth are you bragging about?
I told you, it's fine.
Just leave it to me!
Within the limited time at this party, let's make sure we don't have any regrets.
Have you talked to the actresses yet?
Well,
what does that have to do with it?
It's unrelated, but don’t you think that's a bit cold?
Ah! You think I'm trying to schmooze the actresses?
Oh, I'm glad. You were worried about that.
No, I've already made my move.
You really!
Bravo! Is that so? Hehe. It seems Meryl got a good vibe. Lucky, huh?
Please, quit the sales act.
Why not?!
Why not? This isn't a party for sales.
Huh? I mean, this is a party we were invited to.
Isn't sales kind of embarrassing? Considering the current office situation, I don't think we can afford to be carefree.
Anyway, I'm embarrassed.
Got it. I'll do my best to meet your expectations.
By the way, are you enjoying the party itself?
Well, you see…
Yeah, I'm enjoying it, but I just feel out of place.
Despite that, you're talking to people without hesitation.
Well, I have to do some sales, or it's going to be awkward, you know? For regular folks, places like this are tough.
The boss is impressive, really. He carries himself well. You can tell he comes from a good background.
I'm not doing sales anymore, so please don't look at me with that scary face.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
